title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!
